app.name: WriteAI
app.tagline: Your intelligent writing workspace powered by AI. Start writing, translate, or brainstorm — all in one place.

auth.welcomeBackDesc: Sign in to your WriteAI workspace
auth.resetPasswordDesc: We'll send you a reset link
auth.tagline: Your intelligent writing companion powered by cutting-edge AI

dashboard.featureAIDesc: Summarize, Fix Grammar, Paraphrase, Expand, Shorten & Readability — 6 tools in one click
dashboard.featureTranslateDesc: Translate between English, Vietnamese, Japanese, Chinese, and 11 more languages instantly
dashboard.featurePersonasDesc: Switch between IT Tech Lead, Marketing Pro, and Academic Researcher AI modes
dashboard.featureExportDesc: Export to Markdown, HTML, Plain Text, and PDF with one click

sidebar.emptyFavoritesHint: Right-click a document to add to favorites

editor.placeholder: Start writing or paste your text here...

ai.enableFeatures: to enable AI features. Supports Groq, Google Gemini, and Ollama.

compose.promptLabel: Describe what you want to write
compose.promptPlaceholder: e.g., Write a follow-up email to a client about the project deadline...
compose.topicPlaceholder: e.g., Climate change impact on agriculture...
compose.continueInfo: AI will continue writing from where your text ends. The current editor content will be used as context.
compose.enterPrompt: Please enter a prompt to generate content.
compose.writeFirst: Write some text in the editor first to continue from.

translate.hint: Select text in the editor to translate a specific part, or translate the entire document. Supports 12+ languages.
translate.noText: Write or select some text to translate.
translate.sameLang: Source and target languages are the same.

chat.hint: Ask questions, brainstorm ideas, or get help with your writing.
chat.suggestion1: Help me brainstorm ideas for my essay
chat.suggestion2: What's a good opening for my blog post?
chat.suggestion3: Explain this concept in simpler terms

grammar.title: Grammar Check
grammar.noIssuesHint: Start typing or click "Check now" to scan for grammar issues.

settings.title: AI Provider Settings
settings.ollamaHint: Make sure Ollama is running locally. Default: http://localhost:11434

groq.step2: Navigate to API Keys and create a new key at
groq.step3: Copy the key (starts with gsk_) and paste it below.

gemini.step1: Sign in with your Google account at
gemini.step2: Click "Get API Key" to generate a free key at
gemini.step3: Copy the key and paste it below. Gemma 4 models are completely free!

ollama.step2: Open terminal and pull a model, e.g.
ollama.step4: Click "Refresh models" above to see your installed models.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your intelligent writing companion, powered by AI to help you write better, faster, and smarter.
onboarding.feature1Desc: Summarize, grammar check, translate, rewrite, and more
onboarding.feature2Desc: Full-featured editor with formatting, tables, and images
onboarding.feature3Desc: Your documents stay on your device, never stored on our servers
onboarding.providerSubtitle: WriteAI supports multiple AI providers. Pick one to get started — you can always switch later in Settings.

provider.groqDesc: Super fast inference with Llama & Mixtral models
provider.geminiDesc: Free Gemma 4 & Gemini models by Google
provider.ollamaDesc: Run AI models locally on your machine

groq.step3: Create a new key & paste below
groq.step3Desc: Click "Create API Key", copy it, and paste here:

gemini.step1: Sign in with your Google account
gemini.step2: Click "Get API Key" to generate a free key
gemini.step3: Copy the key and paste below
gemini.step3Desc: Gemma 4 models are completely free — no credit card needed!

ollama.step3Desc: Run: ollama serve (or it may auto-start)

onboarding.testSuccess: Connected! Your AI provider is working.
onboarding.testFailed: Connection failed. Please check your setup.
onboarding.providerHint: You can always change your provider later in Settings.
onboarding.tourSubtitle: Here's a quick overview of your workspace:
onboarding.tourSidebarDesc: Manage your documents — create, search, favorite, and organize.
onboarding.tourEditorDesc: Write with a powerful rich text editor. Bold, lists, tables, and more.
onboarding.tourAIDesc: Use AI tools: summarize, grammar check, translate, compose, chat.
onboarding.tourInlineDesc: Select any text in the editor and an AI menu appears for quick actions.
onboarding.proTipText: Use Ctrl+F to open Find & Replace — search and update text across your document instantly!
onboarding.allSetDesc: Your workspace is ready. Start writing and let AI help you create amazing content.

paywall.upgradeSubtitle: Unlock the full power of AI-assisted writing

templates.title: Choose a Template
templates.subtitle: Start with a pre-made structure or create a blank document
